name: Beth McElroy Kirkwood
bio: Beth McElroy Kirkwood is an educator, community leader, and current MWRD Commissioner. She chairs the Moraine Valley Community College Board, where she oversees a $161 million budget and long-term strategic planning. She emphasizes fiscal responsibility and intergovernmental collaboration in water management.
prior_office: MWRD Commissioner (incumbent; exact start date not confirmed in available sources). Chair, Moraine Valley Community College Board (oversight of $161M budget). Educator and community leader.

Modernize treatment plants — nutrient removal and water reuse
PFAS and pharmaceutical contaminant reduction via source control and legislation

Fiscal responsibility and public budgeting expertise
Invasive species prevention through federal/state partnerships
